text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's rivals have run alongside her for the
past three years, and today, they've all gotten
together to throw her a little party.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gotta say, havin' a party right after the Arima Kinen just feels right.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But geez, Oguri sure is awesome! It's amazing how
she managed to win against every single one of
us!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The funny thing is, I don't even feel upset losing
to her. Being able to run at my very best against
Oguri was such a precious experience.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. We all got plenty of good memories to talk
about. There's just one thing missin'... Even
though we got everythin' nice and ready to go
here...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Da most important person hasn't even shown up!
We got a whole buffet here, but there's no sign of
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Don't tell me... she's fainted from hunger?!
She was fasting to get ready for today, after all!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry I'm late, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey! 'Bout time the star of the party showed up!
We've been waitin' so long, we nearly wasted
away!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... Preparing my speech took longer than I
thought.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. Everyone went out of their way to
prepare this party for me, and I heard it's polite
to give proper thanks in situations like these, so...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, I mean... I'm plenty happy to hear that,
but... this is kinda unusual for you, y'know? I'm
gettin' nervous here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. All right, I'm starting. Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My name is Oguri Cap. I'm an Umamusume who
attends Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ey, how come yer doin' a self-introduction? It's
not like we don't all know ya already...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
When I first started school, I ran without thinking
much of it. I did it because people liked my
running, and because it was fun. That was all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But my feelings slowly started to change.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My trainer and I began setting goals for me to
work toward...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And I met lots of opponents I really didn't want to
lose to.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I practiced, there was always
someone waiting for me in the starting gate who I
wasn't sure I could beat.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It made me so happy knowing that such strong
foes were doing their best to win against me too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
When I thought about how fast you were all
getting, I was overcome with the urge to get up
and run and run and run.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Before I knew it, all I could ever think about, day
or night, was racing with you all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's because all of you were there that the last
three years have passed by in the blink of an
eye... and have been so much fun.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So, thank you, everyone. I hope you'll keep
running with me forever.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Um... How was that? I did give it a lot of thought,
so...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa, now zat was a speech! Didn't know ya
had it in ya, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You've grown so much, Oguri! I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez. Guess I was worried for nothin'. That was
one fine speech right there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's good. I'm glad you all liked it. Okay, next,
I have a speech for you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, of course you do. I've been working on it for a long time. Ahem. My Trainer, by Oguri Cap.
choice_data_list: W-wait, this is kind of embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: To me, my trainer is...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mmph?
choice_data_list: ...Let's eat before the food gets cold.
...Let's eat before the food gets cold.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. 'Sides, don'tcha think ya should save that
stuff for when it's just the two of ya?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? Should I?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yup. It's more personal that way. Anyhoo, let's
chow down already! We got heaps to talk about,
too!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay... All right, then. Let's get started,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: All
text_block_list.text: Yeah!
